laws.title: Public Law 19-152 | The Commerce Legislation and Labor Aggravations Reformations (CLEAR)
laws.status_basis: Operative reorganization and amendment act with a real replacement of 5 U.S.C. 101, plus repeal/transfer provisions aimed at earlier public laws. The source does not show the act itself self-repealed, but the affected executive-department text was later replaced again in the code history.

provisions.evidence: This bill shall be referred to by its short title, "The Commerce Legislation and Labor Aggravations Reformations" or "CLEAR".
This Act shall be severable... This Act shall not be superseded by any newer law unless that law specifically declares its intent to supersede this Act's provisions.
This bill shall be effective immediately upon passage by both chambers of the Congress and signature of the President of the United States.
Pursuant to Public Law 1-1, codes listed in this act shall be applicable.

provisions.text_summary: Definitions and creation of the Department of Commerce and Labor framework.
provisions.evidence: The term "Department" means the Department of Commerce and Labor; ... There shall be a department known as the Department of Commerce and Labor.
provisions.notes: Organic reorganization language; do not force into permanent Code text without an identified positive-law home.

provisions.text_summary: Repeals Public Law 4-29 in its entirety.
provisions.evidence: Public Law 4-29 shall be repealed, in its entirety.
Section 13 of Public Law 12-80 shall be repealed in its entirety.

provisions.text_summary: Replaces Section 13 of Public Law 12-80 with new labor-remedy text.
provisions.exact_change: Replace Section 13 with the enacted remedies, enforcement, review, and costs text.
provisions.evidence: Section 13 of Public Law 12-80 shall now read as; (a) Remedies of the FEC and DOCAL may include...
provisions.notes: Determinable replacement text is present in the source.

provisions.evidence: The operation of a business without a business licence shall be illegal... The hosting of an event... without a valid and active event permit... shall be illegal.

provisions.text_summary: Replaces 5 U.S.C. 101 with a new executive-departments list.
provisions.exact_change: Replace the section text of 5 U.S.C. 101 with the six-department list enacted in SEC 8.
provisions.evidence: 5 U.S.Code § 101 shall be repealed in its entirety. 5 U.S.Code §101 shall now read as; The Executive departments are: ... The Department of Commerce and Labor.
provisions.notes: This is the real textual Code amendment.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML contains only an amendment note at t5/s101; the enacted replacement of 5 U.S.C. 101 is a real textual amendment that must be applied, and the uncodified reorganization language should remain out of permanent Code text.

recommended_actions: amend /us/usc/t5/s101 with the enacted executive-departments list from SEC 8.
record repeal-markings for PL 4-29 and PL 12-80 sec. 13.
keep the department-creation and transfer framework as a non-code note or historical note only.

provisions.evidence: The term "Fire Department" means the District of Columbia Fire and Emergency Medical Services Department...

laws.title: Public Law 22-154 | Officer Bill of Rights (OBR)
laws.status_basis: Full text present. This is a free-standing law-enforcement personnel-rights act with no express amendment to a numbered Code section.

provisions.evidence: This bill shall be referred to as "Officer Bill of Rights" or "OBR"
This Act shall be severable... This Act shall not be superseded by any newer law unless that law specifically declares its intent to supersede this Act's provisions.
This bill shall be effective immediately upon passage...

provisions.text_summary: Definitions for officer, on duty, authorized officer, punitive action, public agency, toll.
provisions.evidence: The term "officer" means any member of a public agency...
No officer shall be prohibited from engaging... in political activity.

provisions.text_summary: Interrogation conditions, notice, and representation rules.
provisions.evidence: the interrogation shall be conducted under the following conditions

provisions.text_summary: Lawful exercise of rights, insubordination, and administrative appeal.
provisions.evidence: No officer shall be subjected to punitive action... because of the lawful exercise of the rights granted under this act

provisions.text_summary: Personnel-file adverse comments, response, inspection, and correction procedures.
provisions.evidence: No officer shall have any comment adverse to his interest entered in his personnel file...

provisions.text_summary: Applicability, jurisdiction, injunctions, and civil penalties.
provisions.evidence: The District Courts shall have initial jurisdiction over any proceeding brought by any officer against any public agency...
Nothing in this act shall in any way be construed to limit the use of any public agency...

do not carry over any full-text dump behavior.

laws.title: Public Law 22-155 | Department of Education Repealment Act
laws.status_basis: Full text present. Operative repeal/abolition act that repeals Public Law 17-129 and abolishes the Department of Education; the act itself is not self-repealed.

provisions.evidence: This Act may be cited as the "Department of Education Repealment Act".
We as a Congress has found the development of the Department... stagnant
This Act shall be severable...
This act shall immediately take effect upon passage of both chambers of Congress and the signature of the President of the United States.
Public Law 17-129 shall be repealed in its entirety.
The United States Department of Education shall cease to exist.
provisions.notes: Abolition language belongs in history/notes, not permanent Code text.

current_implementation.detail: No matching current XML note was found; the source should be handled as repeal-marking plus a concise historical note.

recommended_actions: record repeal-marking for PL 17-129.
exclude the abolition language from permanent Code text and keep only a concise historical note.
avoid false source-limitation boilerplate.
